name: 冲突与和平
subject: humanities
domain_name: 全球议题 / Global Issues / Global Issues
curriculum_points: Analyze the causes of conflict (e.g., ideological, economic, ethnic, religious) at various scales, from interpersonal to international (AO2).
Evaluate the roles of different actors and strategies (e.g., diplomacy, international law, peacekeeping, reconciliation) in conflict resolution and peacebuilding (AO3).
